latest.summary: fix(search): prevent duplicated locale prefix in Pagefind links | fix(csv): persist cleaned and raw data through a single write path

recent.summary: fix(workflow): update publish pipeline to create a PR for Homebrew formula updates instead of pushing directly to main | fix(workflow): add pull-requests write permission for the publish workflow token
feat(release): enforce release retention and archive old release pages | feat(ux): improve show-help UX and documentation entry experience
feat(inference): add outlier diagnostics and Durbin-Watson integration | feat(csv): introduce boxplot visualization engine with CLI integration
feat(regression): add categorical handshake, interaction handling, and inline comments in OLS engine | feat(inference): add multi-dataset merge engine, infer-csv CLI, and structured export system

feat(rename): introduce business-rule based renaming with heuristic keyword detection (invoice, tax, receipt, payroll, contract) | feat(rename): add --business-naming mode with interactive category and prefix selection

archive.summary: fix(workflow): update publish pipeline to create a PR for Homebrew formula updates instead of pushing directly to main | fix(workflow): add pull-requests write permission for the publish workflow token
feat(release): enforce release retention and archive old release pages | feat(ux): improve show-help UX and documentation entry experience
feat(inference): add outlier diagnostics and Durbin-Watson integration | feat(csv): introduce boxplot visualization engine with CLI integration
feat(regression): add categorical handshake, interaction handling, and inline comments in OLS engine | feat(inference): add multi-dataset merge engine, infer-csv CLI, and structured export system

feat(rename): introduce business-rule based renaming with heuristic keyword detection (invoice, tax, receipt, payroll, contract) | feat(rename): add --business-naming mode with interactive category and prefix selection
